title: ReimbursementExpenseLine
description: One expense line matching the line-item table header row (EXPENSE DATE … AMOUNT IN USD) in the sample workbook.

expenseDate.description: Expense date as ISO-8601 calendar date (yyyy-MM-dd). Maps to column EXPENSE DATE.

status.description: Column B (STATUS). Optional on upload; use empty string or omit. When set, must match sheet list (Approved, Query, Declined).

expenseMode.description: How the expense was paid, e.g. Personal Card.

invoiceCurrency.description: ISO currency code on the invoice, e.g. USD, INR.

invoiceAvailable.description: Whether an invoice is available; written to the sheet as Yes/No to match the sample.

reimbursementRequired.description: Whether reimbursement is required; written as TRUE/FALSE in column I to match checkbox cells.

billedCurrency.description: Currency used for billed amount, e.g. INR.

invoiceLink.description: Invoice link(s), e.g. Google Drive filenames or URLs in column INVOICE LINK (G-DRIVE).

reimbursementCurrencyAmount.description: Amount converted to the claim reimbursement currency (column REIMBURSEMENT CURRENCY AMOUNT).

amountUsd.description: Amount in USD (column AMOUNT IN USD).
